title: StackScout // Updates
summary: Public-safe activity stream seeded from official or first-party sources.

items.title: Make opened its CLI to all users
items.summary: Make's 2026 release notes show the Make CLI becoming available to all users, continuing the platform's expansion beyond the browser UI.

items.title: GitHub MCP Server reached 1.0.0
items.summary: The official GitHub MCP server hit 1.0.0 with granular issue field tooling and broader MCP Apps support behind feature flags.

items.title: GitHub CLI 2.90.0 introduced `gh skill` in public preview
items.summary: The latest GitHub CLI release adds search, install, preview, update, and publish flows for portable agent skills.

items.title: Hugging Face added Kernels to the Hub
items.summary: The Hub changelog added Kernels as a new way to browse precompiled, hardware-specific kernels and also continues to push agent traces into the product story.

items.title: Strudel Studio's latest public pass focused on smoke-run reliability
items.summary: The recent manager-side pass caught and fixed a release-smoke issue while keeping the studio workflow moving forward.

items.title: Canvas Planner stayed clean and review-ready in its latest public pass
items.summary: The latest public-ready manager pass kept the board surface fast and uncluttered while tightening browser behavior.

items.title: Playwright MCP 0.0.70 landed as the latest maintenance release
items.summary: The current tagged release is a maintenance cut, while the docs continue to push Playwright MCP as a first-class browser layer for agent workflows.

items.title: n8n kept its March 2026 release line moving
items.summary: The March release notes show continued 1.12x shipping, while docs and blog updates highlight secrets-provider and workflow-hardening work.

items.title: OpenAI launched GPT-5.4
items.summary: GPT-5.4 arrived with native computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context, reinforcing OpenAI's focus on real agent workflows.

items.title: Perplexity doubled down on its product thesis in March 2026
items.summary: Perplexity's public blog framed 'The AI is the Computer' and kept tying that story to its API and device ambitions from late February.

items.title: Anthropic's current system-card set centers Claude Sonnet 4.6
items.summary: Anthropic's model materials list Claude Sonnet 4.6 as the current Sonnet generation and explicitly note API access among the active surfaces.

items.title: Wrangler 4.58.0 improved command grouping and auth ergonomics
items.summary: Cloudflare's Workers SDK release added grouped help categories, better auth token retrieval, and type generation on dev startup.
